title: Valve says there's no end in sight to the memory crisis, and prices are only going to increase: 'Honestly,…
excerpt: Retail availability is lagging bulk supply by "at least three to six months" according to a Valve engineer.
content_html:
As the AI boom gobbles up graphics cards, SSDs, memory sticks, and more, building a gaming PC has become eye-wateringly expensive (and it's never exactly been cheap). If, like me, you've been holding out in the hope those prices will drop to more sensible levels soon, I'm sorry to say that's looking unlikely.

Earlier this month, research showed that memory prices are predicted to rise sharply between now and 2027, with no reductions expected until 2028. Now, Valve has shared its own view of the hardware market, and it's equally glum. Speaking to Bloomberg's Jason Schreier about the company's long road to the Steam Machine, Valve engineer Yazan Aldehayyat said the company only sees prices going up in the short to medium term:

"Honestly, it's still getting worse," Aldehayyat explained. "Just in case people are not aware. What people are seeing on retail shelves right now, from our observations, is lagging what we're seeing from a bulk supply by at least three to six months."

Oof. Valve also provided some insight into how the memory crises affected the Steam Machine's launch. Unsurprisingly, initial supply of the Steam Machine was impacted by memory availability. "We're basically building everything we can," fellow engineer Pierre-Loup Griffais explained. "We're limited by memory capacity, for sure."

Valve didn't go into detail about how many Steam Machines have been produced or sold up to this point. But according to Bloomberg, Valve does not view the success of the device in terms of raw sales figures. Rather, it's about providing players with a viable option for open-source PC gaming in their living rooms.

"We suspect that the Steam Machine is a really good way to solve a very real problem that people have," Aldehayyat said. "If that's borne out to be true, from our opinion, it's a success."

In addition, Griffais said the memory crisis hasn't altered Valve's plans for the future of the device. "Users are getting their machines," he said. "For a lot of the experience, the work starts. We'll be doing that for years to come."

Keep up to date with the most important stories and the best deals, as picked by the PC Gamer team.

The memory crisis wasn't the only subject Valve addressed during the chat. The company also discussed why it opted against launching an exclusive game for the Steam Machine. I had vaguely hoped the launch of new Steam hardware might coincide with the reveal of a certain Half-Life sequel, but Valve said that it's much more interested in "having the whole PC catalog" as its "'launch exclusive'".

Rick has been fascinated by PC gaming since he was seven years old, when he used to sneak into his dad's home office for covert sessions of Doom. He grew up on a diet of similarly unsuitable games, with favourites including Quake, Thief, Half-Life and Deus Ex. Between 2013 and 2022, Rick was games editor of Custom PC magazine and associated website bit-tech.net. But he's always kept one foot in freelance games journalism, writing for publications like Edge, Eurogamer, the Guardian and, naturally, PC Gamer. While he'll play anything that can be controlled with a keyboard and mouse, he has a particular passion for first-person shooters and immersive sims.

sentences.zh: 该公司还讨论了为什么选择不为 Steam Machine 推出独占游戏。

sentences.en: I had vaguely hoped the launch of new Steam hardware might coincide with the reveal of a certain Half-Life sequel, but Valve said that it's much more interested in "having the whole PC catalog" as its "'launch exclusive'".
sentences.zh: 我曾隐约希望新的 Steam 硬件的推出可能与《半条命》续集的发布同时进行，但 Valve 表示它更感兴趣的是“拥有整个 PC 目录”作为其“‘独家发售’”。

blocks.html_en: Rick has been fascinated by PC gaming since he was seven years old, when he used to sneak into his dad's home office for covert sessions of Doom. He grew up on a diet of similarly unsuitable games, with favourites including Quake, Thief, Half-Life and Deus Ex. Between 2013 and 2022, Rick was games editor of Custom PC magazine and associated website bit-tech.net. But he's always kept one foot in freelance games journalism, writing for publications like Edge, Eurogamer, the Guardian and, naturally, PC Gamer. While he'll play anything that can be controlled with a keyboard and mouse, he has a particular passion for first-person shooters and immersive sims.

sentences.en: Rick has been fascinated by PC gaming since he was seven years old, when he used to sneak into his dad's home office for covert sessions of Doom.
sentences.zh: 瑞克从七岁起就对电脑游戏着迷，当时他经常偷偷溜进父亲的家庭办公室秘密玩《毁灭战士》。

sentences.en: He grew up on a diet of similarly unsuitable games, with favourites including Quake, Thief, Half-Life and Deus Ex.
sentences.zh: 他从小就吃着同样不合适的游戏，最喜欢的游戏包括《雷神之锤》、《神偷》、《半条命》和《杀出重围》。

sentences.en: Between 2013 and 2022, Rick was games editor of Custom PC magazine and associated website bit-tech.net.
sentences.zh: 2013 年至 2022 年间，Rick 担任 Custom PC 杂志和相关网站 bit-tech.net 的游戏编辑。

sentences.en: But he's always kept one foot in freelance games journalism, writing for publications like Edge, Eurogamer, the Guardian and, naturally, PC Gamer.
sentences.zh: 但他始终涉足自由游戏新闻领域，为《Edge》、《Eurogamer》、《卫报》和《PC Gamer》等出版物撰稿。

sentences.en: While he'll play anything that can be controlled with a keyboard and mouse, he has a particular passion for first-person shooters and immersive sims.
sentences.zh: 虽然他会玩任何可以用键盘和鼠标控制的游戏，但他对第一人称射击游戏和沉浸式模拟游戏有着特别的热情。

content_html_zh:
随着人工智能的热潮吞噬了显卡、SSD、记忆棒等，构建一台游戏电脑已经变得非常昂贵（而且从来都不是便宜的）。 如果您像我一样一直坚持希望这些价格很快就会降至更合理的水平，我很遗憾地说这看起来不太可能。

本月早些时候，研究表明，从现在到 2027 年，内存价格预计将大幅上涨，并且预计到 2028 年之前不会出现下降。 现在，Valve 也分享了自己对硬件市场的看法，而且同样郁闷。 Valve 工程师 Yazan Aldehayyat 在接受彭博社的 Jason Schreier 采访时谈到了该公司通往 Steam Machine 的漫长道路，他表示该公司只认为价格在中短期内会上涨：

“老实说，情况还在变得更糟，”阿尔德哈亚特解释道。 “以防万一人们不知道。 根据我们的观察，人们现在在零售货架上看到的产品比我们在批量供应中看到的产品至少落后三到六个月。”

钱币。 Valve 还提供了一些有关内存危机如何影响 Steam Machine 发布的见解。 毫不奇怪，Steam Machine 的初始供应受到内存可用性的影响。 “我们基本上正在尽我们所能建造一切，”工程师同事 Pierre-Loup Griffais 解释道。 “当然，我们受到记忆容量的限制。”

Valve 没有详细说明到目前为止已经生产或销售了多少台蒸汽机。 但据彭博社报道，Valve 并不以原始销售数据来看待该设备的成功。 相反，它是为玩家提供在客厅玩开源电脑游戏的可行选择。

“我们怀疑蒸汽机确实是解决人们所面临的一个非常现实的问题的好方法，”阿尔德哈亚特说。 “如果事实证明这是真的，那么我们认为，这就是成功的。”

此外，Griffais 表示，内存危机并没有改变 Valve 对该设备未来的计划。 “用户正在获得他们的机器，”他说。 “有了很多经验，工作就开始了。 未来几年我们将继续这样做。”

及时了解 PC Gamer 团队挑选的最重要的故事和最优惠的交易。

内存危机并不是 Valve 在聊天中讨论的唯一主题。 该公司还讨论了为什么选择不为 Steam Machine 推出独占游戏。 我曾隐约希望新的 Steam 硬件的推出可能与《半条命》续集的发布同时进行，但 Valve 表示它更感兴趣的是“拥有整个 PC 目录”作为其“‘独家发售’”。

瑞克从七岁起就对电脑游戏着迷，当时他经常偷偷溜进父亲的家庭办公室秘密玩《毁灭战士》。 他从小就吃着同样不合适的游戏，最喜欢的游戏包括《雷神之锤》、《神偷》、《半条命》和《杀出重围》。 2013 年至 2022 年间，Rick 担任 Custom PC 杂志和相关网站 bit-tech.net 的游戏编辑。 但他始终涉足自由游戏新闻领域，为《Edge》、《Eurogamer》、《卫报》和《PC Gamer》等出版物撰稿。 虽然他会玩任何可以用键盘和鼠标控制的游戏，但他对第一人称射击游戏和沉浸式模拟游戏有着特别的热情。
